name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=True, restart_at_step=3. The new plan is a refinement of the old plan. The first two steps of the new plan cover the data loading, preprocessing, and initial characterization (TAMSD, velocity, VACF) that were performed in the first three steps of the old plan. Since the old plan has already been executed, the data and intermediate results are already available on disk. Therefore, we can reuse the work from the old plan and start the new plan from step 3, which introduces new analysis (Okubo-Weiss, spatial correlation) not present in the original execution.
